staysVisible: Stays visible until hidden or locked
firstLineHint: First line is the password; the rest is notes.
deleteConfirm: Delete {name}? This removes it everywhere on the next sync. gpm has no in-app undo — recovery is only possible via git history with external tooling.
deleteBlocked: Delete blocked: the remote failed signature verification under Enforce mode. Review in History, then pull to sync and retry.
saveBlocked: Save blocked: the remote failed signature verification under Enforce mode. Review via Sync, then retry.
remoteChanged: The remote changed since you reviewed this — rechecking…
checkIdentityHint: Check your age identity and try again
